a:coach8|act2|end|platform|0.postedit: You step down onto the platform and the doors hiss shut behind you.
a:coach8|act2|end|platform|0.text: You step down onto the platform and the doors hiss shut behind you.

a:coach8|act2|end|platform|1.postedit: The train slides away into the tunnel without you.
a:coach8|act2|end|platform|1.text: The train slides away into the tunnel without you.

a:coach8|act2|end|platform|2.postedit: The sign on the empty platform is a station you have never heard of, and the only service on the board is the train that just left.
a:coach8|act2|end|platform|2.text: The sign on the empty platform is a station you have never heard of, and the only service on the board is the train that just left.

a:coach8|act2|exit|tempt.postedit: The train slows, and a door at the end of the coach opens onto a lit platform. Just step down and you are off.
a:coach8|act2|exit|tempt.text: The train slows, and a door at the end of the coach opens onto a lit platform. Just step down and you are off.

a:coach8|act2|exit|utterance.postedit: The passenger turns to you at last, and speaks in a voice you already know: "You have ridden past your stop."
a:coach8|act2|exit|utterance.text: The passenger turns to you at last, and speaks in a voice you already know: "You have ridden past your stop."

a:coach8|act2|flashback|0.postedit: You had a seat once, further back, your coat over it. You got up to find coach 8.
a:coach8|act2|flashback|0.text: You had a seat once, further back, your coat over it. You got up to find coach 8.

a:coach8|act2|flashback|1.postedit: Someone was meeting you at the end of the line. You cannot hold the name.
a:coach8|act2|flashback|1.text: Someone was meeting you at the end of the line. You cannot hold the name.

a:coach8|act2|flashback|2.postedit: The sleeping passenger's coat is the same as yours. You do not look again.
a:coach8|act2|flashback|2.text: The sleeping passenger's coat is the same as yours. You do not look again.

a:coach8|act2|flashback|3.postedit: The note scratched on the table is in your own hand. It says again, or it says eight.
a:coach8|act2|flashback|3.text: The note scratched on the table is in your own hand. It says again, or it says eight.

a:coach8|act2|flashback|4.postedit: You were sure the next stop was yours. The next stop is always the next stop.
a:coach8|act2|flashback|4.text: You were sure the next stop was yours. The next stop is always the next stop.

a:coach8|act2|t:luggage|fold|0.postedit: Inside is the row of carriages, folded small and receding. When you look up you are at the first coach again.
a:coach8|act2|t:luggage|fold|0.text: Inside is the row of carriages, folded small and receding. When you look up you are at the first coach again.

a:coach8|act2|t:luggage|herring|0.postedit: The tag's ink is still wet. It was probably always wet.
a:coach8|act2|t:luggage|herring|0.text: The tag's ink is still wet. It was probably always wet.

a:coach8|act2|t:luggage|herring|1.postedit: Your own initials are on the tag, in your hand. Common initials.
a:coach8|act2|t:luggage|herring|1.text: Your own initials are on the tag, in your hand. Common initials.

a:coach8|act2|t:luggage|reaction|0.postedit: Someone's folded shirts, a paperback, a ticket stub. Ordinary things, going somewhere.
a:coach8|act2|t:luggage|reaction|0.text: Someone's folded shirts, a paperback, a ticket stub. Ordinary things, going somewhere.

a:coach8|act2|t:luggage|reaction|1.postedit: It is heavier than it looks, and it does not want to open all the way.
a:coach8|act2|t:luggage|reaction|1.text: It is heavier than it looks, and it does not want to open all the way.

a:coach8|act2|t:passenger|fold|0.postedit: They say your name in their sleep, clearly, once, and the sound of it carries you back to the first coach.
a:coach8|act2|t:passenger|fold|0.text: They say your name in their sleep, clearly, once, and the sound of it carries you back to the first coach.

a:coach8|act2|t:passenger|herring|0.postedit: Their coat is the same cut as yours. Coats are coats.
a:coach8|act2|t:passenger|herring|0.text: Their coat is the same cut as yours. Coats are coats.

a:coach8|act2|t:passenger|herring|1.postedit: For a second the face under the hood is turned toward you. Then it is not.
a:coach8|act2|t:passenger|herring|1.text: For a second the face under the hood is turned toward you. Then it is not.

a:coach8|act2|t:passenger|reaction|0.postedit: A murmur, no words you can keep. They do not wake.
a:coach8|act2|t:passenger|reaction|0.text: A murmur, no words you can keep. They do not wake.

a:coach8|act2|t:passenger|reaction|1.postedit: They shift, and settle, and their breathing falls into step with yours.
a:coach8|act2|t:passenger|reaction|1.text: They shift, and settle, and their breathing falls into step with yours.

a:coach8|act2|t:table|fold|0.postedit: You trace the tally with a finger and lose count, and the losing puts you back at coach one.
a:coach8|act2|t:table|fold|0.text: You trace the tally with a finger and lose count, and the losing puts you back at coach one.

a:coach8|act2|t:table|herring|0.postedit: A ring of coffee still wet beside it, as if someone just left. People just left.
a:coach8|act2|t:table|herring|0.text: A ring of coffee still wet beside it, as if someone just left. People just left.

a:coach8|act2|t:table|herring|1.postedit: The scratches look raw, made minutes ago. Or polished by years. You cannot tell.
a:coach8|act2|t:table|herring|1.text: The scratches look raw, made minutes ago. Or polished by years. You cannot tell.

a:coach8|act2|t:table|reaction|0.postedit: Letters gouged into the laminate by a key or a nail. AGAIN, mostly. And a tally.
a:coach8|act2|t:table|reaction|0.text: Letters gouged into the laminate by a key or a nail. AGAIN, mostly. And a tally.

a:coach8|act2|t:table|reaction|1.postedit: Under the newer marks, older ones, smoothed almost flat by hands.
a:coach8|act2|t:table|reaction|1.text: Under the newer marks, older ones, smoothed almost flat by hands.

a:coach8|act2|t:window|fold|0.postedit: You watch the dark until it is all there is, and the coach resets around your reflection, back at the start.
a:coach8|act2|t:window|fold|0.text: You watch the dark until it is all there is, and the coach resets around your reflection, back at the start.

a:coach8|act2|t:window|herring|0.postedit: A handprint fogs and fades on the glass that is not yours. Or is.
a:coach8|act2|t:window|herring|0.text: A handprint fogs and fades on the glass that is not yours. Or is.

a:coach8|act2|t:window|herring|1.postedit: Lights out there that could be a town, or could be the train, doubled.
a:coach8|act2|t:window|herring|1.text: Lights out there that could be a town, or could be the train, doubled.

a:coach8|act2|t:window|reaction|0.postedit: Your reflection lags a half second behind you.
a:coach8|act2|t:window|reaction|0.text: Your reflection lags a half second behind you.

a:coach8|act2|t:window|reaction|1.postedit: Black glass, a tunnel, and then a platform sliding by too fast to read.
a:coach8|act2|t:window|reaction|1.text: Black glass, a tunnel, and then a platform sliding by too fast to read.

a:coach8|adaptive|long_look|0.postedit: You spend longer looking than usual. You don't remember deciding to stop.
a:coach8|adaptive|long_look|0.text: You spend longer looking than usual. You don't remember deciding to stop.

a:coach8|adaptive|long_look|1.postedit: You realise you've been standing in the aisle. For how long?
a:coach8|adaptive|long_look|1.text: You realise you've been standing in the aisle. For how long?

a:coach8|adaptive|long_look|2.postedit: The train sways on, and you don't know how long you've been staring.
a:coach8|adaptive|long_look|2.text: The train sways on, and you don't know how long you've been staring.

a:coach8|adaptive|repeat_inspect|0.postedit: You look at the {THING} again. You aren't sure why.
a:coach8|adaptive|repeat_inspect|0.text: You look at the {THING} again. You aren't sure why.

a:coach8|adaptive|repeat_inspect|1.postedit: Your eyes go straight to the {THING}, the way they always seem to now.
a:coach8|adaptive|repeat_inspect|1.text: Your eyes go straight to the {THING}, the way they always seem to now.

a:coach8|adaptive|repeat_inspect|2.postedit: The {THING} draws your attention once more.
a:coach8|adaptive|repeat_inspect|2.text: The {THING} draws your attention once more.

a:coach8|attempt.postedit: {n} times through this train, and this time it reached your stop.
a:coach8|attempt.text: {n} times through this train, and this time it reached your stop.

a:coach8|attempt_first.postedit: First ride, and the coach never doubled back.
a:coach8|attempt_first.text: First ride, and the coach never doubled back.

a:coach8|framing|cutscene|0.postedit: Something in the coach changed, and you moved on past it.
a:coach8|framing|cutscene|0.text: Something in the coach changed, and you moved on past it.

a:coach8|framing|cutscene|1.postedit: If a coach is not exactly as you remember, turn back. If it is, keep moving on.
a:coach8|framing|cutscene|1.text: If a coach is not exactly as you remember, turn back. If it is, keep moving on.

a:coach8|framing|intro|2.postedit: The conductor clipped your ticket and nodded up the train. Coach 8, that way.
a:coach8|framing|intro|2.text: The conductor clipped your ticket and nodded up the train. Coach 8, that way.

a:coach8|framing|intro|3.postedit: That was a while ago. You're still walking, and every carriage looks the same.
a:coach8|framing|intro|3.text: That was a while ago. You're still walking, and every carriage looks the same.

a:coach8|framing|intro|5.postedit: While a carriage is exactly as you remember it, keep walking forward.
a:coach8|framing|intro|5.text: While a carriage is exactly as you remember it, keep walking forward.

a:coach8|framing|intro|6.postedit: If anything has changed, turn around. This one is folding you back.
a:coach8|framing|intro|6.text: If anything has changed, turn around. This one is folding you back.

a:coach8|framing|intro|8.postedit: Eight coaches, and you can finally sit down.
a:coach8|framing|intro|8.text: Eight coaches, and you can finally sit down.

a:coach8|framing|intro|9.postedit: Lose your certainty, and the train sets you back where you started.
a:coach8|framing|intro|9.text: Lose your certainty, and the train sets you back where you started.

a:coach8|framing|win|0.postedit: You slide open one more door, and the seat numbers read 8.
a:coach8|framing|win|0.text: You slide open one more door, and the seat numbers read 8.

a:coach8|framing|win|1.postedit: Coach 8. Your seat, empty and waiting, beside a black window.
a:coach8|framing|win|1.text: Coach 8. Your seat, empty and waiting, beside a black window.

a:coach8|framing|win|2.postedit: You sink into it at last. The train rushes on through the night.
a:coach8|framing|win|2.text: You sink into it at last. The train rushes on through the night.

a:coach8|p:door|v:closed|0.postedit: The connecting door at the coach's end is shut, its glass dark.
a:coach8|p:door|v:closed|0.text: The connecting door at the coach's end is shut, its glass dark.

a:coach8|p:door|v:closed|1.postedit: The powered door to the next carriage stands closed, as usual.
a:coach8|p:door|v:closed|1.text: The powered door to the next carriage stands closed, as usual.

a:coach8|p:door|v:closed|2.postedit: The end door is closed, the vestibule beyond it dim.
a:coach8|p:door|v:closed|2.text: The end door is closed, the vestibule beyond it dim.

a:coach8|p:door|x:glass|0.postedit: The glass in the connecting door is fogged, a hand-print on it.
a:coach8|p:door|x:glass|0.text: The glass in the connecting door is fogged, a hand-print on it.

a:coach8|p:door|x:glass|1.postedit: Something smears the window of the end door from the far side.
a:coach8|p:door|x:glass|1.text: Something smears the window of the end door from the far side.

a:coach8|p:door|x:glass|2.postedit: The connecting door's glass is cracked in a spider's web.
a:coach8|p:door|x:glass|2.text: The connecting door's glass is cracked in a spider's web.

a:coach8|p:door|x:locked|0.postedit: A red light burns on the connecting door: LOCKED.
a:coach8|p:door|x:locked|0.text: A red light burns on the connecting door: LOCKED.

a:coach8|p:door|x:locked|1.postedit: The end door shows a locked indicator that was green before.
a:coach8|p:door|x:locked|1.text: The end door shows a locked indicator that was green before.

a:coach8|p:door|x:locked|2.postedit: The door to the next coach reads DO NOT ENTER.
a:coach8|p:door|x:locked|2.text: The door to the next coach reads DO NOT ENTER.

a:coach8|p:door|x:open|0.postedit: The connecting door is stuck open, cold air rushing through.
a:coach8|p:door|x:open|0.text: The connecting door is stuck open, cold air rushing through.

a:coach8|p:door|x:open|1.postedit: The powered door won't close; the vestibule roars beyond.
a:coach8|p:door|x:open|1.text: The powered door won't close; the vestibule roars beyond.

a:coach8|p:door|x:open|2.postedit: The end door gapes open onto the shaking vestibule.
a:coach8|p:door|x:open|2.text: The end door gapes open onto the shaking vestibule.

a:coach8|p:lighting|v:dim|0.postedit: The cabin lights are dimmed for night, a soft amber wash.
a:coach8|p:lighting|v:dim|0.text: The cabin lights are dimmed for night, a soft amber wash.

a:coach8|p:lighting|v:dim|1.postedit: Low night-lighting glows along the luggage racks, as always.
a:coach8|p:lighting|v:dim|1.text: Low night-lighting glows along the luggage racks, as always.

a:coach8|p:lighting|v:dim|2.postedit: The overhead lights are down to their amber night setting.
a:coach8|p:lighting|v:dim|2.text: The overhead lights are down to their amber night setting.

a:coach8|p:lighting|v:dim|3.postedit: The coach is lit the same soft gold as the last.
a:coach8|p:lighting|v:dim|3.text: The coach is lit the same soft gold as the last.

a:coach8|p:lighting|x:bright|0.postedit: The lights are up full, harsh and white, not the night setting.
a:coach8|p:lighting|x:bright|0.text: The lights are up full, harsh and white, not the night setting.

a:coach8|p:lighting|x:bright|1.postedit: This coach is lit far brighter than the last.
a:coach8|p:lighting|x:bright|1.text: This coach is lit far brighter than the last.

a:coach8|p:lighting|x:bright|2.postedit: The soft amber is gone; everything glares white.
a:coach8|p:lighting|x:bright|2.text: The soft amber is gone; everything glares white.

a:coach8|p:lighting|x:flicker|0.postedit: The cabin lights flutter with the motion of the train, then hold.
a:coach8|p:lighting|x:flicker|0.text: The cabin lights flutter with the motion of the train, then hold.

a:coach8|p:lighting|x:flicker|1.postedit: One strip of lighting stutters overhead.
a:coach8|p:lighting|x:flicker|1.text: One strip of lighting stutters overhead.

a:coach8|p:lighting|x:flicker|2.postedit: The amber light trips off, then on again.
a:coach8|p:lighting|x:flicker|2.text: The amber light trips off, then on again.

a:coach8|p:lighting|x:off|0.postedit: The cabin is dark but for the emergency floor strips.
a:coach8|p:lighting|x:off|0.text: The cabin is dark but for the emergency floor strips.

a:coach8|p:lighting|x:off|1.postedit: The lights are out here; only the aisle markers glow.
a:coach8|p:lighting|x:off|1.text: The lights are out here; only the aisle markers glow.

a:coach8|p:lighting|x:off|2.postedit: Darkness, save a thin line of light along the floor.
a:coach8|p:lighting|x:off|2.text: Darkness, save a thin line of light along the floor.

a:coach8|p:luggage|v:stowed|0.postedit: A single suitcase sits in the luggage rack by the door.
a:coach8|p:luggage|v:stowed|0.text: A single suitcase sits in the luggage rack by the door.

a:coach8|p:luggage|v:stowed|1.postedit: The overhead racks hold the usual scattering of bags.
a:coach8|p:luggage|v:stowed|1.text: The overhead racks hold the usual scattering of bags.

a:coach8|p:luggage|v:stowed|2.postedit: One hard-shell case rides the luggage rack, as before.
a:coach8|p:luggage|v:stowed|2.text: One hard-shell case rides the luggage rack, as before.

a:coach8|p:luggage|x:gone|0.postedit: The luggage rack is empty now.
a:coach8|p:luggage|x:gone|0.text: The luggage rack is empty now.

a:coach8|p:luggage|x:gone|1.postedit: The suitcase by the door is gone.
a:coach8|p:luggage|x:gone|1.text: The suitcase by the door is gone.

a:coach8|p:luggage|x:gone|2.postedit: There are no bags in the racks this time.
a:coach8|p:luggage|x:gone|2.text: There are no bags in the racks this time.

a:coach8|p:luggage|x:more|0.postedit: The luggage rack is crammed full, far more bags than before.
a:coach8|p:luggage|x:more|0.text: The luggage rack is crammed full, far more bags than before.

a:coach8|p:luggage|x:more|1.postedit: Cases are stacked nearly to the ceiling now.
a:coach8|p:luggage|x:more|1.text: Cases are stacked nearly to the ceiling now.

a:coach8|p:luggage|x:more|2.postedit: The racks overflow with luggage that wasn't there.
a:coach8|p:luggage|x:more|2.text: The racks overflow with luggage that wasn't there.

a:coach8|p:luggage|x:open|0.postedit: The suitcase in the rack lies open, empty.
a:coach8|p:luggage|x:open|0.text: The suitcase in the rack lies open, empty.

a:coach8|p:luggage|x:open|1.postedit: A case has spilled open across the luggage rack.
a:coach8|p:luggage|x:open|1.text: A case has spilled open across the luggage rack.

a:coach8|p:luggage|x:open|2.postedit: The hard-shell case gapes open, its contents gone.
a:coach8|p:luggage|x:open|2.text: The hard-shell case gapes open, its contents gone.

a:coach8|p:passenger|v:sleeping|0.postedit: A lone passenger sleeps against the far window, coat over their face.
a:coach8|p:passenger|v:sleeping|0.text: A lone passenger sleeps against the far window, coat over their face.

a:coach8|p:passenger|v:sleeping|1.postedit: One passenger dozes midway down the coach, head tipped back.
a:coach8|p:passenger|v:sleeping|1.text: One passenger dozes midway down the coach, head tipped back.

a:coach8|p:passenger|v:sleeping|2.postedit: The same sleeping figure slumps in a window seat, as before.
a:coach8|p:passenger|v:sleeping|2.text: The same sleeping figure slumps in a window seat, as before.

a:coach8|p:passenger|x:awake|0.postedit: The passenger is awake now, sitting upright, very still.
a:coach8|p:passenger|x:awake|0.text: The passenger is awake now, sitting upright, very still.

a:coach8|p:passenger|x:awake|1.postedit: The sleeper's eyes are open, fixed on the aisle.
a:coach8|p:passenger|x:awake|1.text: The sleeper's eyes are open, fixed on the aisle.

a:coach8|p:passenger|x:awake|2.postedit: The passenger no longer sleeps. They watch you pass.
a:coach8|p:passenger|x:awake|2.text: The passenger no longer sleeps. They watch you pass.

a:coach8|p:passenger|x:gone|0.postedit: The seat where the passenger slept is empty now.
a:coach8|p:passenger|x:gone|0.text: The seat where the passenger slept is empty now.

a:coach8|p:passenger|x:gone|1.postedit: No one is sleeping in the coach this time.
a:coach8|p:passenger|x:gone|1.text: No one is sleeping in the coach this time.

a:coach8|p:passenger|x:gone|2.postedit: The dozing passenger is gone; only a folded coat remains.
a:coach8|p:passenger|x:gone|2.text: The dozing passenger is gone; only a folded coat remains.

a:coach8|p:passenger|x:moved|0.postedit: The sleeping passenger has moved to a seat nearer the aisle.
a:coach8|p:passenger|x:moved|0.text: The sleeping passenger has moved to a seat nearer the aisle.

a:coach8|p:passenger|x:moved|1.postedit: The dozing figure is closer than before, on your side now.
a:coach8|p:passenger|x:moved|1.text: The dozing figure is closer than before, on your side now.

a:coach8|p:passenger|x:moved|2.postedit: The passenger sleeps in a different seat than a moment ago.
a:coach8|p:passenger|x:moved|2.text: The passenger sleeps in a different seat than a moment ago.

a:coach8|p:passenger|x:speaks|0.postedit: The sleeping passenger murmurs, without waking: 'again?'
a:coach8|p:passenger|x:speaks|0.text: The sleeping passenger murmurs, without waking: 'again?'

a:coach8|p:passenger|x:speaks|1.postedit: From under the coat, a muffled voice: 'you were just here.'
a:coach8|p:passenger|x:speaks|1.text: From under the coat, a muffled voice: 'you were just here.'

a:coach8|p:passenger|x:speaks|2.postedit: The dozing figure says the name of your stop, though you told no one.
a:coach8|p:passenger|x:speaks|2.text: The dozing figure says the name of your stop, though you told no one.

a:coach8|p:passenger|x:two|0.postedit: Two passengers sleep here now, where there was one.
a:coach8|p:passenger|x:two|0.text: Two passengers sleep here now, where there was one.

a:coach8|p:passenger|x:two|1.postedit: There are a pair of coats-over-faces this time, not one.
a:coach8|p:passenger|x:two|1.text: There are a pair of coats-over-faces this time, not one.

a:coach8|p:passenger|x:two|2.postedit: A second sleeping figure has joined the first.
a:coach8|p:passenger|x:two|2.text: A second sleeping figure has joined the first.

a:coach8|p:seatnum|v:eight|0.postedit: The seat decals read 8A, 8B, 8C down the row.
a:coach8|p:seatnum|v:eight|0.text: The seat decals read 8A, 8B, 8C down the row.

a:coach8|p:seatnum|v:eight|1.postedit: Little brass numbers mark the seats: row 8, as always.
a:coach8|p:seatnum|v:eight|1.text: Little brass numbers mark the seats: row 8, as always.

a:coach8|p:seatnum|v:eight|2.postedit: The coach-number panel by the door glows COACH 8.
a:coach8|p:seatnum|v:eight|2.text: The coach-number panel by the door glows COACH 8.

a:coach8|p:seatnum|x:letters|0.postedit: The seat decals read 8X, 8Y, 8Z, letters that don't belong.
a:coach8|p:seatnum|x:letters|0.text: The seat decals read 8X, 8Y, 8Z, letters that don't belong.

a:coach8|p:seatnum|x:letters|1.postedit: The row is numbered in an alphabet you don't recognise.
a:coach8|p:seatnum|x:letters|1.text: The row is numbered in an alphabet you don't recognise.

a:coach8|p:seatnum|x:letters|2.postedit: The seat labels are just symbols now, not numbers.
a:coach8|p:seatnum|x:letters|2.text: The seat labels are just symbols now, not numbers.

a:coach8|p:seatnum|x:missing|0.postedit: The seat numbers have been prised off; bare screw-holes remain.
a:coach8|p:seatnum|x:missing|0.text: The seat numbers have been prised off; bare screw-holes remain.

a:coach8|p:seatnum|x:missing|1.postedit: The coach-number panel by the door is dark and blank.
a:coach8|p:seatnum|x:missing|1.text: The coach-number panel by the door is dark and blank.

a:coach8|p:seatnum|x:missing|2.postedit: There are no numbers on the seats at all this time.
a:coach8|p:seatnum|x:missing|2.text: There are no numbers on the seats at all this time.

a:coach8|p:seatnum|x:wrong|0.postedit: The seat decals read row 7 now, not 8.
a:coach8|p:seatnum|x:wrong|0.text: The seat decals read row 7 now, not 8.

a:coach8|p:seatnum|x:wrong|2.postedit: The brass numbers say row 6; you were sure it was 8.
a:coach8|p:seatnum|x:wrong|2.text: The brass numbers say row 6; you were sure it was 8.

a:coach8|p:sense|v:steady|0.postedit: The train feels exactly as long as it always has.
a:coach8|p:sense|v:steady|0.text: The train feels exactly as long as it always has.

a:coach8|p:sense|v:steady|1.postedit: You carry the same tired patience up the aisle, coach after coach.
a:coach8|p:sense|v:steady|1.text: You carry the same tired patience up the aisle, coach after coach.

a:coach8|p:sense|v:steady|2.postedit: Everything feels as ordinary as a night train should.
a:coach8|p:sense|v:steady|2.text: Everything feels as ordinary as a night train should.

a:coach8|p:sense|x:calm|0.postedit: You feel suddenly, wrongly calm, as if you'd already arrived.
a:coach8|p:sense|x:calm|0.text: You feel suddenly, wrongly calm, as if you'd already arrived.

a:coach8|p:sense|x:calm|1.postedit: A strange contentment settles over you that has no business being here.
a:coach8|p:sense|x:calm|1.text: A strange contentment settles over you that has no business being here.

a:coach8|p:sense|x:calm|2.postedit: You feel no urgency at all, and that itself feels wrong.
a:coach8|p:sense|x:calm|2.text: You feel no urgency at all, and that itself feels wrong.

a:coach8|p:sense|x:forget|0.postedit: For a moment you can't remember how many coaches you've walked.
a:coach8|p:sense|x:forget|0.text: For a moment you can't remember how many coaches you've walked.

a:coach8|p:sense|x:forget|1.postedit: You lose count of the carriages behind you, and it frightens you.
a:coach8|p:sense|x:forget|1.text: You lose count of the carriages behind you, and it frightens you.

a:coach8|p:sense|x:forget|2.postedit: You can't recall boarding this train at all.
a:coach8|p:sense|x:forget|2.text: You can't recall boarding this train at all.

a:coach8|p:sense|x:watched|0.postedit: You feel watched, though every passenger is asleep.
a:coach8|p:sense|x:watched|0.text: You feel watched, though every passenger is asleep.

a:coach8|p:sense|x:watched|1.postedit: The certainty that someone is behind you won't leave.
a:coach8|p:sense|x:watched|1.text: The certainty that someone is behind you won't leave.

a:coach8|p:sense|x:watched|2.postedit: Your neck prickles; you are sure you are not alone in the way you were.
a:coach8|p:sense|x:watched|2.text: Your neck prickles; you are sure you are not alone in the way you were.

a:coach8|p:sound|v:rhythm|0.postedit: The rails beat their steady rhythm beneath the floor.
a:coach8|p:sound|v:rhythm|0.text: The rails beat their steady rhythm beneath the floor.

a:coach8|p:sound|v:rhythm|1.postedit: The train hums along, wheels ticking over the joints.
a:coach8|p:sound|v:rhythm|1.text: The train hums along, wheels ticking over the joints.

a:coach8|p:sound|v:rhythm|2.postedit: That familiar sway and clatter of a train at speed.
a:coach8|p:sound|v:rhythm|2.text: That familiar sway and clatter of a train at speed.

a:coach8|p:sound|x:announce|0.postedit: A chime sounds, then a muffled announcement you can't make out.
a:coach8|p:sound|x:announce|0.text: A chime sounds, then a muffled announcement you can't make out.

a:coach8|p:sound|x:announce|1.postedit: The PA crackles with a voice, then cuts off.
a:coach8|p:sound|x:announce|1.text: The PA crackles with a voice, then cuts off.

a:coach8|p:sound|x:faster|0.postedit: The rails beat faster than they should, a rising whine.
a:coach8|p:sound|x:faster|0.text: The rails beat faster than they should, a rising whine.

a:coach8|p:sound|x:faster|1.postedit: The train is accelerating, the clatter climbing in pitch.
a:coach8|p:sound|x:faster|1.text: The train is accelerating, the clatter climbing in pitch.

a:coach8|p:sound|x:faster|2.postedit: Everything rattles harder; you're speeding up.
a:coach8|p:sound|x:faster|2.text: Everything rattles harder; you're speeding up.

a:coach8|p:sound|x:silence|0.postedit: The wheels have gone silent. You feel no motion at all.
a:coach8|p:sound|x:silence|0.text: The wheels have gone silent. You feel no motion at all.

a:coach8|p:sound|x:silence|1.postedit: The train sound has stopped. Dead still.
a:coach8|p:sound|x:silence|1.text: The train sound has stopped. Dead still.

a:coach8|p:sound|x:silence|2.postedit: No clatter, no sway. The train might not be moving.
a:coach8|p:sound|x:silence|2.text: No clatter, no sway. The train might not be moving.

a:coach8|p:sound|x:slowing|0.postedit: The rhythm of the rails is slowing. Are you stopping?
a:coach8|p:sound|x:slowing|0.text: The rhythm of the rails is slowing. Are you stopping?

a:coach8|p:sound|x:slowing|1.postedit: The clatter drags, as if the train is losing speed.
a:coach8|p:sound|x:slowing|1.text: The clatter drags, as if the train is losing speed.

a:coach8|p:sound|x:slowing|2.postedit: The beat beneath the floor stretches longer between ticks.
a:coach8|p:sound|x:slowing|2.text: The beat beneath the floor stretches longer between ticks.

a:coach8|p:table|v:coffee|0.postedit: A fold-down table by the aisle holds a half-finished coffee.
a:coach8|p:table|v:coffee|0.text: A fold-down table by the aisle holds a half-finished coffee.

a:coach8|p:table|v:coffee|1.postedit: The tray table is down, a paper cup cooling on it, as always.
a:coach8|p:table|v:coffee|1.text: The tray table is down, a paper cup cooling on it, as always.

a:coach8|p:table|v:coffee|2.postedit: On the table, someone's coffee, still steaming faintly.
a:coach8|p:table|v:coffee|2.text: On the table, someone's coffee, still steaming faintly.

a:coach8|p:table|x:cold|0.postedit: The coffee on the table has gone cold, a skin across the top.
a:coach8|p:table|x:cold|0.text: The coffee on the table has gone cold, a skin across the top.

a:coach8|p:table|x:cold|1.postedit: The cup is stone cold now, long abandoned.
a:coach8|p:table|x:cold|1.text: The cup is stone cold now, long abandoned.

a:coach8|p:table|x:cold|2.postedit: The coffee sits cold and still, no steam at all.
a:coach8|p:table|x:cold|2.text: The coffee sits cold and still, no steam at all.

a:coach8|p:table|x:empty|0.postedit: The table is bare; the coffee cup is gone.
a:coach8|p:table|x:empty|0.text: The table is bare; the coffee cup is gone.

a:coach8|p:table|x:empty|1.postedit: The tray table holds nothing now.
a:coach8|p:table|x:empty|1.text: The tray table holds nothing now.

a:coach8|p:table|x:empty|2.postedit: There's no cup on the table this time.
a:coach8|p:table|x:empty|2.text: There's no cup on the table this time.

a:coach8|p:table|x:many|0.postedit: The table is crowded with cups now, not one but many.
a:coach8|p:table|x:many|0.text: The table is crowded with cups now, not one but many.

a:coach8|p:table|x:many|1.postedit: Several coffees crowd the tray table where there was one.
a:coach8|p:table|x:many|1.text: Several coffees crowd the tray table where there was one.

a:coach8|p:table|x:many|2.postedit: The table is cluttered with more cups than anyone could drink.
a:coach8|p:table|x:many|2.text: The table is cluttered with more cups than anyone could drink.

a:coach8|p:table|x:spilled|0.postedit: The coffee has spilled, a dark stain spreading over the table.
a:coach8|p:table|x:spilled|0.text: The coffee has spilled, a dark stain spreading over the table.

a:coach8|p:table|x:spilled|1.postedit: The cup is tipped, coffee running off the table's edge.
a:coach8|p:table|x:spilled|1.text: The cup is tipped, coffee running off the table's edge.

a:coach8|p:table|x:spilled|2.postedit: Coffee pools across the table, dripping to the floor.
a:coach8|p:table|x:spilled|2.text: Coffee pools across the table, dripping to the floor.

a:coach8|p:window|v:night|0.postedit: Beyond the window, black countryside and your own faint reflection.
a:coach8|p:window|v:night|0.text: Beyond the window, black countryside and your own faint reflection.

a:coach8|p:window|v:night|1.postedit: The window shows only night and the ghost of the cabin.
a:coach8|p:window|v:night|1.text: The window shows only night and the ghost of the cabin.

a:coach8|p:window|v:night|2.postedit: Dark fields streak past the window, far-off lights scattered.
a:coach8|p:window|v:night|2.text: Dark fields streak past the window, far-off lights scattered.

a:coach8|p:window|x:daylight|0.postedit: The window is bright with daylight. It was night a moment ago.
a:coach8|p:window|x:daylight|0.text: The window is bright with daylight. It was night a moment ago.

a:coach8|p:window|x:daylight|1.postedit: Outside the glass it is suddenly, impossibly, day.
a:coach8|p:window|x:daylight|1.text: Outside the glass it is suddenly, impossibly, day.

a:coach8|p:window|x:daylight|2.postedit: Sunlight fills the window where there was only dark.
a:coach8|p:window|x:daylight|2.text: Sunlight fills the window where there was only dark.

a:coach8|p:window|x:reflection|0.postedit: Your reflection in the glass is a half-second behind you.
a:coach8|p:window|x:reflection|0.text: Your reflection in the glass is a half-second behind you.

a:coach8|p:window|x:reflection|1.postedit: The reflection in the window doesn't quite match the cabin.
a:coach8|p:window|x:reflection|1.text: The reflection in the window doesn't quite match the cabin.

a:coach8|p:window|x:reflection|2.postedit: Someone stands in the window's reflection who isn't in the coach.
a:coach8|p:window|x:reflection|2.text: Someone stands in the window's reflection who isn't in the coach.

a:coach8|p:window|x:station|0.postedit: The window shows a lit platform sliding by, a station, unannounced.
a:coach8|p:window|x:station|0.text: The window shows a lit platform sliding by, a station, unannounced.

a:coach8|p:window|x:station|1.postedit: Outside, a station platform passes, empty and bright.
a:coach8|p:window|x:station|1.text: Outside, a station platform passes, empty and bright.

a:coach8|p:window|x:station|2.postedit: A station slides past the glass; you never felt the train slow.
a:coach8|p:window|x:station|2.text: A station slides past the glass; you never felt the train slow.

a:coach8|p:window|x:tunnel|0.postedit: The window is pure black, a tunnel, roaring, with no end to it.
a:coach8|p:window|x:tunnel|0.text: The window is pure black, a tunnel, roaring, with no end to it.

a:coach8|p:window|x:tunnel|1.postedit: You're in a tunnel now; the glass shows only rushing dark.
a:coach8|p:window|x:tunnel|1.text: You're in a tunnel now; the glass shows only rushing dark.

a:coach8|p:window|x:tunnel|2.postedit: Nothing but black tunnel wall streams past the window.
a:coach8|p:window|x:tunnel|2.text: Nothing but black tunnel wall streams past the window.

a:coach8|tagline.postedit: The conductor said coach 8. The train never seems to reach it.
a:coach8|tagline.text: The conductor said coach 8. The train never seems to reach it.

a:hallway-eight|act2|end|lobby|0.postedit: You push through the lit door expecting the street.
a:hallway-eight|act2|end|lobby|0.text: You push through the lit door expecting the street.

a:hallway-eight|act2|end|lobby|1.postedit: It is the lobby you started in, the glass still locked, the night still black behind it.
a:hallway-eight|act2|end|lobby|1.text: It is the lobby you started in, the glass still locked, the night still black behind it.

a:hallway-eight|act2|end|lobby|2.postedit: The corridor you walked is simply gone. You are back at the beginning of a building that no longer has a way out.
a:hallway-eight|act2|end|lobby|2.text: The corridor you walked is simply gone. You are back at the beginning of a building that no longer has a way out.

a:hallway-eight|act2|exit|tempt.postedit: A door ahead stands open, a lit EXIT humming green above it. The street must be just through there.
a:hallway-eight|act2|exit|tempt.text: A door ahead stands open, a lit EXIT humming green above it. The street must be just through there.

a:hallway-eight|act2|flashback|0.postedit: A desk lamp still burns a few doors back. A cup of coffee gone cold at its own ring. The clock reads a time the clock cannot read.
a:hallway-eight|act2|flashback|0.text: A desk lamp still burns a few doors back. A cup of coffee gone cold at its own ring. The clock reads a time the clock cannot read.

a:hallway-eight|act2|flashback|1.postedit: A phone is buzzing in a room you have not reached yet. The name on the screen is almost yours.
a:hallway-eight|act2|flashback|1.text: A phone is buzzing in a room you have not reached yet. The name on the screen is almost yours.

a:hallway-eight|act2|flashback|2.postedit: You had the lobby doors at six. You turned back for something you have already forgotten.
a:hallway-eight|act2|flashback|2.text: You had the lobby doors at six. You turned back for something you have already forgotten.

a:hallway-eight|act2|flashback|3.postedit: The man in grey held the fire door once, a long time ago, and looked at you the way you look at someone you are about to leave behind.
a:hallway-eight|act2|flashback|3.text: The man in grey held the fire door once, a long time ago, and looked at you the way you look at someone you are about to leave behind.

a:hallway-eight|act2|flashback|4.postedit: You have counted to eight before. You are almost sure of it. You are almost sure you never reached it.
a:hallway-eight|act2|flashback|4.text: You have counted to eight before. You are almost sure of it. You are almost sure you never reached it.

a:hallway-eight|act2|t:camera|fold|0.postedit: The camera follows your hand back the way you came, and your feet follow the camera, and you are at the start again.
a:hallway-eight|act2|t:camera|fold|0.text: The camera follows your hand back the way you came, and your feet follow the camera, and you are at the start again.

a:hallway-eight|act2|t:camera|herring|0.postedit: A red light you do not remember blinks once. It was probably always on.
a:hallway-eight|act2|t:camera|herring|0.text: A red light you do not remember blinks once. It was probably always on.

a:hallway-eight|act2|t:camera|herring|1.postedit: For a second the lens fogs, as if breathed on from the inside.
a:hallway-eight|act2|t:camera|herring|1.text: For a second the lens fogs, as if breathed on from the inside.

a:hallway-eight|act2|t:camera|reaction|0.postedit: It swivels, unhurried, and settles on you. Nothing else moves.
a:hallway-eight|act2|t:camera|reaction|0.text: It swivels, unhurried, and settles on you. Nothing else moves.

a:hallway-eight|act2|t:camera|reaction|1.postedit: The lens tilts down to your eyeline and holds there, patient.
a:hallway-eight|act2|t:camera|reaction|1.text: The lens tilts down to your eyeline and holds there, patient.

a:hallway-eight|act2|t:door|fold|0.postedit: It opens onto a stretch of corridor you have already walked. The number in your head is gone. You are at the start again.
a:hallway-eight|act2|t:door|fold|0.text: It opens onto a stretch of corridor you have already walked. The number in your head is gone. You are at the start again.

a:hallway-eight|act2|t:door|herring|0.postedit: The metal is warm, warmer than a locked door should be. It probably means nothing.
a:hallway-eight|act2|t:door|herring|0.text: The metal is warm, warmer than a locked door should be. It probably means nothing.

a:hallway-eight|act2|t:door|herring|1.postedit: There is a draft under it that was not there before. Or was, and you never noticed.
a:hallway-eight|act2|t:door|herring|1.text: There is a draft under it that was not there before. Or was, and you never noticed.

a:hallway-eight|act2|t:door|reaction|0.postedit: The handle turns a little and stops, as if held from the other side.
a:hallway-eight|act2|t:door|reaction|0.text: The handle turns a little and stops, as if held from the other side.

a:hallway-eight|act2|t:door|reaction|1.postedit: You put your ear to it. Something on the far side goes quiet, the way a room does when you enter.
a:hallway-eight|act2|t:door|reaction|1.text: You put your ear to it. Something on the far side goes quiet, the way a room does when you enter.

a:hallway-eight|act2|t:figure|fold|0.postedit: He turns, finally, and it is a face you know too well, and the sight of it puts you back at the start.
a:hallway-eight|act2|t:figure|fold|0.text: He turns, finally, and it is a face you know too well, and the sight of it puts you back at the start.

a:hallway-eight|act2|t:figure|herring|0.postedit: For a moment his suit looks like yours. Grey is grey.
a:hallway-eight|act2|t:figure|herring|0.text: For a moment his suit looks like yours. Grey is grey.

a:hallway-eight|act2|t:figure|herring|1.postedit: He is a little nearer than when you called. Just the walking, surely.
a:hallway-eight|act2|t:figure|herring|1.text: He is a little nearer than when you called. Just the walking, surely.

a:hallway-eight|act2|t:figure|reaction|0.postedit: Your voice goes down the corridor and does not come back. He does not turn.
a:hallway-eight|act2|t:figure|reaction|0.text: Your voice goes down the corridor and does not come back. He does not turn.

a:hallway-eight|act2|t:figure|reaction|1.postedit: He pauses, a half step, the way you pause at your own name in a crowd. Then he walks on.
a:hallway-eight|act2|t:figure|reaction|1.text: He pauses, a half step, the way you pause at your own name in a crowd. Then he walks on.

a:hallway-eight|act2|t:figure|verb.postedit: call out to the man in grey
a:hallway-eight|act2|t:figure|verb.text: call out to the man in grey

a:hallway-eight|act2|t:poster|fold|0.postedit: You lean in until the dots are all there is, and when you step back the corridor has reset around you.
a:hallway-eight|act2|t:poster|fold|0.text: You lean in until the dots are all there is, and when you step back the corridor has reset around you.

a:hallway-eight|act2|t:poster|herring|0.postedit: The ink is still tacky. Freshly printed. It means nothing, and you know it means nothing, and still your hand pulls back.
a:hallway-eight|act2|t:poster|herring|0.text: The ink is still tacky. Freshly printed. It means nothing, and you know it means nothing, and still your hand pulls back.

a:hallway-eight|act2|t:poster|herring|1.postedit: The colours are too bright for how faded it looked a moment ago. A trick of the light.
a:hallway-eight|act2|t:poster|herring|1.text: The colours are too bright for how faded it looked a moment ago. A trick of the light.

a:hallway-eight|act2|t:poster|reaction|0.postedit: Up close the beach is only dots of ink. A place you were going to go.
a:hallway-eight|act2|t:poster|reaction|0.text: Up close the beach is only dots of ink. A place you were going to go.

a:hallway-eight|act2|t:poster|reaction|1.postedit: The corner has been peeled and pressed back so many times the paper has gone soft.
a:hallway-eight|act2|t:poster|reaction|1.text: The corner has been peeled and pressed back so many times the paper has gone soft.

a:hallway-eight|attempt.postedit: {n} times down this corridor, and this time it opened.
a:hallway-eight|attempt.text: {n} times down this corridor, and this time it opened.

a:hallway-eight|attempt_first.postedit: First time through, and the corridor let you go.
a:hallway-eight|attempt_first.text: First time through, and the corridor let you go.

a:hallway-eight|framing|cutscene|0.postedit: Something in the corridor changed, and you walked on past it.
a:hallway-eight|framing|cutscene|0.text: Something in the corridor changed, and you walked on past it.

a:hallway-eight|framing|cutscene|1.postedit: If a stretch is not exactly as you remember, turn back. If it is, walk on.
a:hallway-eight|framing|cutscene|1.text: If a stretch is not exactly as you remember, turn back. If it is, walk on.

a:stairway8|act2|end|climb|0.postedit: You take the shortcut door, sure it drops you at the ground.
a:stairway8|act2|end|climb|0.text: You take the shortcut door, sure it drops you at the ground.

a:stairway8|act2|end|climb|1.postedit: The number on the wall is higher than the floor you began on.
a:stairway8|act2|end|climb|1.text: The number on the wall is higher than the floor you began on.

a:stairway8|act2|end|climb|2.postedit: The flight down has become a flight up, and every door from here opens onto stairs that only rise.
a:stairway8|act2|end|climb|2.text: The flight down has become a flight up, and every door from here opens onto stairs that only rise.

a:stairway8|act2|exit|tempt.postedit: A landing door hangs open below, and past it the stairs seem to drop straight to the street. A shortcut down.
a:stairway8|act2|exit|tempt.text: A landing door hangs open below, and past it the stairs seem to drop straight to the street. A shortcut down.

a:stairway8|act2|flashback|0.postedit: You came up in the lift once. You remember the doors closing on a face.
a:stairway8|act2|flashback|0.text: You came up in the lift once. You remember the doors closing on a face.

a:stairway8|act2|flashback|1.postedit: There was a floor you were visiting. You cannot say the number now, only that you did not want to go.
a:stairway8|act2|flashback|1.text: There was a floor you were visiting. You cannot say the number now, only that you did not want to go.

a:stairway8|act2|flashback|2.postedit: The figure below waved up at you the first time, and you told yourself it was meant for someone else.
a:stairway8|act2|flashback|2.text: The figure below waved up at you the first time, and you told yourself it was meant for someone else.

a:stairway8|act2|flashback|3.postedit: You have read these scratches before. One of them is a tally, and it goes past eight.
a:stairway8|act2|flashback|3.text: You have read these scratches before. One of them is a tally, and it goes past eight.

a:stairway8|act2|flashback|4.postedit: You were sure the ground floor was next. You have been sure before.
a:stairway8|act2|flashback|4.text: You were sure the ground floor was next. You have been sure before.

a:stairway8|act2|t:door|fold|0.postedit: It swings open onto a landing you passed three floors ago. The count is gone. You are at the top again.
a:stairway8|act2|t:door|fold|0.text: It swings open onto a landing you passed three floors ago. The count is gone. You are at the top again.

a:stairway8|act2|t:door|herring|0.postedit: The paint on it is tacky, freshly done, though the sign beside it is yellow with age.
a:stairway8|act2|t:door|herring|0.text: The paint on it is tacky, freshly done, though the sign beside it is yellow with age.

a:stairway8|act2|t:door|herring|1.postedit: A cold draft comes up through the gap, carrying nothing you can name.
a:stairway8|act2|t:door|herring|1.text: A cold draft comes up through the gap, carrying nothing you can name.

a:stairway8|act2|t:door|reaction|0.postedit: The bar gives a finger's width and stops, a chain you cannot see holding it.
a:stairway8|act2|t:door|reaction|0.text: The bar gives a finger's width and stops, a chain you cannot see holding it.

a:stairway8|act2|t:door|reaction|1.postedit: Behind it, faintly, the sound of the same stairwell going down.
a:stairway8|act2|t:door|reaction|1.text: Behind it, faintly, the sound of the same stairwell going down.

a:stairway8|act2|t:figure|fold|0.postedit: It climbs to meet you, unhurried, and when it reaches your landing you are somehow back at the top, alone.
a:stairway8|act2|t:figure|fold|0.text: It climbs to meet you, unhurried, and when it reaches your landing you are somehow back at the top, alone.

a:stairway8|act2|t:figure|herring|0.postedit: The coat down there is the colour of yours. Most coats are.
a:stairway8|act2|t:figure|herring|0.text: The coat down there is the colour of yours. Most coats are.

a:stairway8|act2|t:figure|herring|1.postedit: It is a landing nearer than when you called. You have been walking, after all.
a:stairway8|act2|t:figure|herring|1.text: It is a landing nearer than when you called. You have been walking, after all.

a:stairway8|act2|t:figure|reaction|0.postedit: Your voice comes back a beat late, in your own tone.
a:stairway8|act2|t:figure|reaction|0.text: Your voice comes back a beat late, in your own tone.

a:stairway8|act2|t:figure|reaction|1.postedit: Far below, a face tips up toward the sound, or the shadow of one.
a:stairway8|act2|t:figure|reaction|1.text: Far below, a face tips up toward the sound, or the shadow of one.

a:stairway8|act2|t:notice|fold|0.postedit: You read to the bottom and the bottom says START, and it is.
a:stairway8|act2|t:notice|fold|0.text: You read to the bottom and the bottom says START, and it is.

a:stairway8|act2|t:notice|herring|0.postedit: The tape holding it is fresh, still shiny. Notices like this are always being replaced.
a:stairway8|act2|t:notice|herring|0.text: The tape holding it is fresh, still shiny. Notices like this are always being replaced.

a:stairway8|act2|t:notice|herring|1.postedit: The paper is warm, as if just off a machine. Buildings are strange at night.
a:stairway8|act2|t:notice|herring|1.text: The paper is warm, as if just off a machine. Buildings are strange at night.

a:stairway8|act2|t:notice|reaction|0.postedit: LIFT OUT OF ORDER, USE STAIRS. Someone has underlined USE, twice, hard.
a:stairway8|act2|t:notice|reaction|0.text: LIFT OUT OF ORDER, USE STAIRS. Someone has underlined USE, twice, hard.

a:stairway8|act2|t:notice|reaction|1.postedit: Below the print, in pencil, a hand has written a number and crossed it out.
a:stairway8|act2|t:notice|reaction|1.text: Below the print, in pencil, a hand has written a number and crossed it out.

a:stairway8|act2|t:railing|fold|0.postedit: You follow it down with your eyes, and your feet follow your eyes, and you are climbing again, at the start.
a:stairway8|act2|t:railing|fold|0.text: You follow it down with your eyes, and your feet follow your eyes, and you are climbing again, at the start.

a:stairway8|act2|t:railing|herring|0.postedit: Cold, where you left it warm a landing ago. It means nothing.
a:stairway8|act2|t:railing|herring|0.text: Cold, where you left it warm a landing ago. It means nothing.

a:stairway8|act2|t:railing|herring|1.postedit: It is a shade of green you do not remember it being. The light down here is bad.
a:stairway8|act2|t:railing|herring|1.text: It is a shade of green you do not remember it being. The light down here is bad.

a:stairway8|act2|t:railing|reaction|0.postedit: It is colder than the air, and it hums faintly, the way a rail does when someone far below holds it too.
a:stairway8|act2|t:railing|reaction|0.text: It is colder than the air, and it hums faintly, the way a rail does when someone far below holds it too.

a:stairway8|act2|t:railing|reaction|1.postedit: Your hand leaves no print on it, though it should.
a:stairway8|act2|t:railing|reaction|1.text: Your hand leaves no print on it, though it should.

a:stairway8|attempt.postedit: {n} times down these stairs, and this time they let you out.
a:stairway8|attempt.text: {n} times down these stairs, and this time they let you out.

a:stairway8|attempt_first.postedit: First descent, and the stair never turned you back.
a:stairway8|attempt_first.text: First descent, and the stair never turned you back.

a:stairway8|framing|cutscene|0.postedit: Something on the landing changed, and you went down past it.
a:stairway8|framing|cutscene|0.text: Something on the landing changed, and you went down past it.

a:stairway8|framing|cutscene|1.postedit: If a landing is not exactly as you remember, go back up. If it is, keep going down.
a:stairway8|framing|cutscene|1.text: If a landing is not exactly as you remember, go back up. If it is, keep going down.

ui|ach_d_flawless.postedit: Escape a place without a single reset.
ui|ach_d_flawless.text: Escape a place without a single reset.

ui|ach_d_melon.postedit: Thank you for keeping the lights on. From all of us at Melon Labs.
ui|ach_d_melon.text: Thank you for keeping the lights on. From all of us at Melon Labs.

ui|ach_d_nerve.postedit: Turn back at the final door, and be right.
ui|ach_d_nerve.text: Turn back at the final door, and be right.

ui|ach_d_npc_knows.postedit: Be acknowledged by the one who is always ahead.
ui|ach_d_npc_knows.text: Be acknowledged by the one who is always ahead.

ui|ach_d_opening_night.postedit: Play on the day it opened.
ui|ach_d_opening_night.text: Play on the day it opened.

ui|ach_d_shared.postedit: Send the place to someone else.
ui|ach_d_shared.text: Send the place to someone else.

ui|ach_d_streak.postedit: Three clean escapes in a row.
ui|ach_d_streak.text: Three clean escapes in a row.

ui|ach_empty.postedit: Nothing yet. Escape a place to begin.
ui|ach_empty.text: Nothing yet. Escape a place to begin.

ui|col_recall_empty.postedit: A fragment you have seen, its words already fading.
ui|col_recall_empty.text: A fragment you have seen, its words already fading.

ui|diff_hint_hard.postedit: Hard adds new kinds of change.
ui|diff_hint_hard.text: Hard adds new kinds of change.

ui|diff_hint_insane.postedit: Insane remakes what normal is, every run.
ui|diff_hint_insane.text: Insane remakes what normal is, every run.

ui|erase_body.postedit: Everything this place remembers of you goes: the fragments you have recollected, the marks you have earned, every run. This cannot be undone.
ui|erase_body.text: Everything this place remembers of you goes: the fragments you have recollected, the marks you have earned, every run. This cannot be undone.

ui|fold_1.postedit: That was you. You reached for something in the place, and it folded the way back on you.
ui|fold_1.text: That was you. You reached for something in the place, and it folded the way back on you.

ui|fold_2.postedit: Touching what you find is never necessary. Look if you like, but a wrong touch can send you here.
ui|fold_2.text: Touching what you find is never necessary. Look if you like, but a wrong touch can send you here.

ui|hesitate_2.postedit: You're not sure. You take another look.
ui|hesitate_2.text: You're not sure. You take another look.

ui|hesitate_3.postedit: Doubt stops you. Read it once more.
ui|hesitate_3.text: Doubt stops you. Read it once more.

ui|hesitate_4.postedit: You hold back, and let your eyes travel over it again.
ui|hesitate_4.text: You hold back, and let your eyes travel over it again.

ui|nudge_arcs.postedit: Two other places are also called 8.
ui|nudge_arcs.text: Two other places are also called 8.

ui|nudge_eight.postedit: Eight escapes from one place is a different kind of remembering.
ui|nudge_eight.text: Eight escapes from one place is a different kind of remembering.

ui|nudge_frags.postedit: There are {n} memories here you have not seen yet.
ui|nudge_frags.text: There are {n} memories here you have not seen yet.

ui|read_cold.postedit: You walked it without a second look.
ui|read_cold.text: You walked it without a second look.

ui|read_nerve.postedit: You turned back at the very last door, and you were right.
ui|read_nerve.text: You turned back at the very last door, and you were right.

ui|read_steady.postedit: You never once called it a guess.
ui|read_steady.text: You never once called it a guess.

ui|rec_nerve.postedit: Turned back at the final door, and was right.
ui|rec_nerve.text: Turned back at the final door, and was right.

ui|rules_plain.postedit: Something changed? Go back. Nothing changed? Go on. Eight in a row to get out.
ui|rules_plain.text: Something changed? Go back. Nothing changed? Go on. Eight in a row to get out.

ui|share_1.postedit: There is a place you can't quite leave. I left. Now it's your turn.
ui|share_1.text: There is a place you can't quite leave. I left. Now it's your turn.

ui|share_2.postedit: Somewhere you can't quite leave, someone found the door. Come find yours.
ui|share_2.text: Somewhere you can't quite leave, someone found the door. Come find yours.

ui|share_3.postedit: Eight chances to doubt yourself. I trusted the right ones. Now you.
ui|share_3.text: Eight chances to doubt yourself. I trusted the right ones. Now you.

ui|share_4.postedit: I know the way out now. I won't tell you where. Come and see.
ui|share_4.text: I know the way out now. I won't tell you where. Come and see.

ui|share_5.postedit: A quiet place, eight small doubts, one way through. I found it. Can you?
ui|share_5.text: A quiet place, eight small doubts, one way through. I found it. Can you?

ui|share_6.postedit: I walked it eight times and trusted what I remembered. See if you can.
ui|share_6.text: I walked it eight times and trusted what I remembered. See if you can.

ui|share_7.postedit: The way out comes down to what you remember. I remembered. Now you try.
ui|share_7.text: The way out comes down to what you remember. I remembered. Now you try.

ui|share_8.postedit: Eight doors stood between me and the cold air. I opened every one. Your turn.
ui|share_8.text: Eight doors stood between me and the cold air. I opened every one. Your turn.
